failedAssertions.reason: shadcn components are present, but globals.css still maps the dark card token to oklch(0.205 0 0) instead of the required 4% white glass token.
Cards are transparent over the shader, but sampled BetterCard instances render 14px corners instead of the required 8px radius.
BetterCard hover sheen is still too bright, using a 0.38 white hotspot and 0.12 ring that reads as a loud flare instead of a subtle response.
The primary 'SEE WHAT'S LIVE' CTA still renders dark text on white, so not every visible text element remains white/opacity-white.
The liquid-metal hover finish is brighter than surrounding text/shader instead of staying restrained and refined.
The hover metallic response still creates bright hotspots rather than a quiet, low-contrast complement to the shader background.

preconditionNote: A new pending implementation feature (shadcn-soften-card-hover-sheen) was added during this run, so the milestone no longer satisfied the original "all implementation features complete" precondition by the end of validation.
